title: astragalus zarreanus
intro: Astragalus zarreanus is a species of legume in the pea family, native to Iran. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The roots and stems of Astragalus zarreanus contain saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, contributing to its potential health benefits. Astragalus zarreanus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and may be used to support immune function, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and cardiovascular diseases.
